sections.heading: Example Problem
sections.content:
Solve simultaneously for x and y. 3x – y = 3 eq 1
9x2 - y 2 = 45 eq 2

sections.heading: Worked Solution
sections.content:
Solution
From eq 2
(3x)2 - y 2 = 45
(3x-y) (3x+y) = 45 eq 3
Substitute eq 1 into eq 3
3 (3x + y) = 45
3x + y = 15 eq4
Solve eq 1 and eq 4 simultaneously. 3x – y = 3 eq 1
3x + y = 15 eq 4
eq 1 + eq 4
6x = 18
x = 18/ 6 x = 3
Substitute x = 3 into eq 4. 3x + y = 15
3 (3) + y = 15
9 + y = 15
y = 15 – 9
y = 6
 x = 3, y = 6
